rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARGIE SONNIER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgement.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's motion to quash service of summons is granted. Petitioner failed to serve the summons and petition on the proper party, which is the Office of the Mayor or the Clerk of the San Francisco Board of Supervisors. Respondent's motion to set aside and vacate the default judgment is granted. Petitioner served the summons and petition on the San Francisco County Tax Assessor instead of the Office of the Mayor or the Clerk of the San Francisco Board of Supervisors. Thus, service is ineffective and the default judgment is void.
